info.title: Myth Code Generation Tool
info.description:
Available commands:
setup                Setup project from template
create               Generate code artifacts
version              Show version information
Global options:
--verbose            Show detailed output
-h, --help           Show help information
Use 'myth <command> -h' for help with specific commands.

options.name: --help
options.description:
Show help information
Use 'myth <command> -h' for help with specific commands.
